messages.content: hi
Hello! How can I assist you today?

Check grammar, structure and correctness for English Australian:
During this process, I was continuously led on, blatantly asked for payment for the re-assessment of warranty faults that had been persisting, while refusing to provide any assurance that the faults would be permanently fixed. This started to make me question the credibility, trustworthiness, and sincerity of the dealership in delivering a permanent fix for the inherent vehicle faults. Furthermore, the audacity of your final proposed conditions, which removed all hope of a permanent resolution to the warranty faults, confirmed that the faults were not going to be fixed. This further put me under duress, immense stress, and pressure, making me feel utterly helpless and intimidated.

During this process, I was continuously led on, blatantly asked for payment for the re-assessment of warranty faults that had been persisting, while refusing to provide any assurance that the faults would be permanently fixed. This made me start questioning the credibility, trustworthiness, and sincerity of the dealership in delivering a permanent solution for the inherent vehicle faults. Additionally, the audacity of your final proposed conditions, which removed any hope of a permanent resolution to the warranty faults, confirmed that the faults would not be fixed. This further caused me duress, immense stress, and pressure, leaving me feeling utterly helpless and intimidated.

Check grammar, structure and correctness for English Australian:
Unfortunately, your actions have shown a complete lack of empathy and professionalism. You attempted to shift the blame onto me, the customer, making me feel like I was causing the impasse. You intimidated me into thinking that unless I agreed to your conditions, no alternative resolution would be available, because all dealers follow the same standards as you do.

Unfortunately, your actions have displayed a complete lack of empathy and professionalism. You tried to shift the blame onto me, the customer, making me feel as though I was causing the deadlock. You intimidated me, leading me to believe that unless I agreed to your conditions, there would be no alternative resolution, as all dealers adhere to the same standards as you do.

Check grammar, structure and correctness for English Australian:
A proper, legitimate business would have taken a different approach. They would have been honest and transparent from the start, genuinely working to resolve the faults and putting their customers’ needs first. On the other hand, your actions have been callous and indifferent, leaving me disillusioned and resentful. They exacerbate the pain and grief I am already experiencing and perpetuate the extreme distress in my life.

A proper, legitimate business would have adopted a different approach. They would have been honest and transparent from the beginning, genuinely seeking to address the faults and prioritizing the needs of their customers. Conversely, your actions have been heartless and apathetic, leaving me feeling disillusioned and resentful. They worsen the pain and distress I am already enduring, perpetuating the immense turmoil in my life.

Check grammar, structure and correctness for English Australian:
If you were aware from the outset that your dealership was not capable of permanently fixing the warranty faults, why not be honest from the very beginning about this situation?  Why not state as you said now, “We will be unable to assist you with your vehicle.”, and “It is our recommendation that you return to your selling dealer for assistance.” Instead, I was misled from when I first approached the dealership 12 months ago. But then, much worse repeatedly deceived from the 6 May 2023, even though I sent at least 20 emails to LDV, expressing my genuine concerns.

If you were aware from the beginning that your dealership was incapable of resolving the warranty faults permanently, why didn't you honestly communicate this situation from the start? Why didn't you state, as you are now, "We will not be able to help you with your vehicle" and "We recommend that you go back to your selling dealer for assistance"? Instead, I was misled from the moment I first approached the dealership 12 months ago. However, it was even more disheartening to be repeatedly deceived from 6 May 2023, despite sending at least 20 emails to LDV, expressing my genuine concerns.

Check grammar, structure and correctness for English Australian:
It is evident from your handling of my warranty issue that your warranty practices align more with a scam rather than a legitimate business operation. Your refusal to address the inherent warranty vehicle faults and your unwillingness to engage in any further communication only reinforce this suspicion. I am left with no choice but to question your integrity, as well as that of LDV Australia and the Ateco Group.

It is clear from the way you have handled my warranty issue that your practices regarding warranties resemble more of a scam rather than a legitimate business operation. Your refusal to address the inherent faults covered under warranty and your unwillingness to engage in any further communication only serve to strengthen this suspicion. I am left with no option but to question not only your integrity but also that of LDV Australia and the Ateco Group.

Check grammar, structure and correctness for English Australian:
The complete disregard for my inquiries, coupled with the outrageous claims that I am the reason for the impasse, demonstrates a total lack of responsibility and accountability on your part. It is concerning and appalling that you would make such baseless accusations without considering the facts. Our communications only reinforce the conviction that the dealership is engaged in unethical and improper practices in dealing with my vehicle’s warranty faults, which remain unresolved.

The blatant disregard for my inquiries, along with the absurd assertions that I am to blame for the deadlock, showcases a complete absence of responsibility and accountability on your end. It is both concerning and appalling that you would make unfounded accusations without taking the facts into consideration. Our communications only serve to further solidify the belief that the dealership is involved in unethical and improper conduct when it comes to addressing the unresolved warranty faults in my vehicle.

Check grammar, structure and correctness for English Australian:
Your attempts to absolve yourself of any responsibility and silence me with your sudden declaration of “no further communication” are reprehensible and unacceptable. It is now abundantly clear that there was never any intention to rectify the ongoing faults that have persisted for an extraordinary period of time. You have shown reluctance to provide any help for a permanent resolution of the warranty faults.

Your efforts to evade responsibility and silence me through your abrupt declaration of "no further communication" are utterly reprehensible and unacceptable. It is now glaringly evident that there was never any intention to rectify the persistent faults that have plagued my vehicle for an extended period. Your reluctance to offer assistance for a permanent resolution of the warranty faults has become apparent.

Check grammar, structure and correctness for English Australian:
I am writing this email with profound disappointment and frustration in response to your handling of the warranty faults in my LDV T60. Your statement that “this is our final decision, and no further communication will be entered into” is appalling and demonstrates indifference and disregard for your responsibilities as the Dealer Principal. It highlights your disregard for customer satisfaction.

I am writing this email filled with deep disappointment and frustration in regard to how you have handled the warranty faults in my LDV T60. Your statement that "this is our final decision, and no further communication will be entertained" is absolutely appalling and showcases a blatant indifference and lack of regard for your obligations as the Dealer Principal. It clearly illustrates a disregard for customer satisfaction.

Check grammar, structure and correctness for English Australian:
Dismissive Attitude: Despite numerous attempts to communicate the faults and seek a permanent resolution, you have consistently evaded acknowledging and dismissed the severity of the persistent faults that compromise my safety while using the vehicle.

Dismissive Attitude: Despite multiple efforts to raise awareness about the faults and pursue a permanent solution, you have consistently avoided acknowledging and downplayed the seriousness of the persistent faults that jeopardize my safety while operating the vehicle.

Lack of Transparency: Despite numerous attempts to seek answers, you have chosen to evade questions and remain silent on crucial matters, leaving me with doubts and deepening suspicions about your intentions, motives, and the lawfulness of your processes

Lack of Transparency: Despite multiple attempts to seek clarification, you have opted to dodge inquiries and maintain silence on critical matters, resulting in a growing sense of uncertainty and heightened suspicions regarding your intentions, motives, and adherence to lawful procedures.

Unfair Conditions: Your imposed conditions, which conveniently favour your dealership, are skewed in your favour and designed to evade your obligations. They perpetuate an unacceptable cycle of recurring faults and unfair practices.

Unfair Conditions: The conditions you have imposed, which unfairly benefit your dealership, are heavily biased in your favor and aimed at evading your responsibilities. They only contribute to an unacceptable pattern of recurring faults and unjust practices.

Check grammar, structure and correctness for English Australian:
Failure to Facilitate Communication: There has been a deliberate prevention of permitting direct communication with the Dealer Principal and the General Manager, exposing a willingness to engage in constructive communication.
Deficient Customer Service: Customer service, under the current leadership, has been appalling, demonstrating a complete lack of empathy and care for customers. This raises significant doubts about your commitment to customer satisfaction.

Failure to Facilitate Communication: There has been a deliberate obstruction in allowing direct communication with the Dealer Principal and the General Manager, revealing a reluctance to engage in constructive dialogue.

Deficient Customer Service: The level of customer service, under the current leadership, has been shockingly inadequate, showcasing a complete absence of empathy and concern for customers. This raises substantial doubts about your dedication to ensuring customer satisfaction.

Check grammar, structure and correctness for English Australian:
Negligence: Your refusal to acknowledge and resolve faults has posed a significant risk to my safety and the safety of others on the road, highlighting a lack of responsibility. Claims that faults have been fixed through software updates, but persist, demonstrate a complete lack of integrity and competence.
Refusal to Honour Warranty: Despite the vehicle being under a national LDV factory-backed warranty, you have consistently failed to address the faults within the framework of the warranty arrangements. You have refused to honour warranty commitments.

Negligence: Your unwillingness to acknowledge and rectify the faults has presented a substantial safety hazard for both myself and other road users, revealing a lack of responsibility. Assertions that the faults have been resolved through software updates, only to persist, further showcase a complete absence of integrity and competence.

Refusal to Honour Warranty: Despite the vehicle being covered by a nationwide LDV factory-backed warranty, you have consistently neglected to address the faults within the parameters of the warranty agreements. You have steadfastly refused to uphold your warranty obligations.
